login.title: Welcome Back!
login.subtitle: Access your personalized roadmap
login.magicLinkInfo: We'll send a magic link to your email. Click it to log in instantly — no password needed!
login.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent! Check your inbox.
login.timeoutTitle: For security purposes, you can only request this after {seconds} seconds.
login.sessionTimeout: Session timed out. Please refresh to continue.
login.verificationFailed: We couldn't complete your email verification automatically. Please sign in below with the email and password you used during signup.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.body: We sent a verification link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
